<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Letswash — Silicone Covers</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{--lav:#c084e0;--orange:#f5830a;--dark:#1c1c2e;--body:#3d3d5c;--muted:#8888aa;--border:#ebebf5;}
body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:#f8f8fc;padding:52px 24px 64px;color:var(--dark)}
.hd{text-align:center;margin-bottom:40px}
.ey{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:12px}
.tt{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(28px,4.5vw,48px);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-1.5px;line-height:1.05;color:var(--dark)}
.tt em{font-style:italic;color:var(--lav)}
.sb{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);margin-top:10px;line-height:1.6;max-width:500px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}

.color-row{display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:40px}
.swatch{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;border:3px solid transparent;transition:transform 0.2s,border-color 0.2s;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)}
.swatch:hover{transform:scale(1.15)}
.swatch.active{border-color:var(--dark);transform:scale(1.18)}

.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(190px,1fr));gap:18px;max-width:1060px;margin:0 auto}

.card{border-radius:22px;border:2px solid var(--border);background:white;cursor:pointer;transition:transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1),box-shadow 0.25s,border-color 0.18s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.card:hover{transform:translateY(-8px);box-shadow:0 20px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.1);border-color:transparent}
.card.sel{border-color:var(--lav);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(192,132,224,.25)}

.vis{width:100%;padding:20px 16px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:#f5f5f8;position:relative;min-height:180px}
.vis img{width:130px;height:auto;object-fit:contain;transition:transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);display:block}
.card:hover .vis img{transform:scale(1.08) rotate(-3deg)}
.card.sel .vis img{transform:scale(1.05)}

.nbadge{position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;background:var(--orange);color:white;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:100px;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase}
.chk{position:absolute;top:10px;right:10px;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--lav);display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.card.sel .chk{display:flex}

.bd{padding:14px 16px 18px}
.color-dot{width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;margin-bottom:6px;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08)}
.nm{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:var(--dark);margin-bottom:5px}
.ds{font-size:12px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:14px}
.ft{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.pr{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:var(--dark)}
.ab{background:var(--dark);color:white;border:none;padding:8px 16px;border-radius:100px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;transition:background 0.18s,transform 0.13s}
.ab:hover{background:var(--lav);transform:translateY(-2px)}

.bar{max-width:1060px;margin:28px auto 0;padding:18px 24px;border-radius:18px;background:white;border:2px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.bl-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px}
.bl-val{font-size:13px;color:var(--dark);font-weight:500}
.br{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.tot{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:600;color:var(--dark)}
.cta{background:var(--lav);color:white;border:none;padding:12px 26px;border-radius:100px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;transition:background 0.18s,transform 0.18s}
.cta:hover{background:#a04fcf;transform:translateY(-2px)}
.empty{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);font-style:italic}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="hd">
  <p class="ey">Silicone Covers</p>
  <h2 class="tt">Snap it on. <em>Stand out.</em></h2>
  <p class="sb">Soft silicone that protects your Letswash bottle and clips to your bag, keys or belt loop via the metal keyring.</p>
</div>

<div class="color-row" id="swatches"></div>
<div class="grid" id="grid"></div>

<div class="bar">
  <div>
    <div class="bl-lbl">Your selection</div>
    <div class="bl-val" id="bval"><span class="empty">Tap any cover to add it</span></div>
  </div>
  <div class="br">
    <span class="tot" id="btot" style="display:none"></span>
    <button class="cta" onclick="cart()">Add to cart →</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const ITEMS = [
  {id:1,name:"Bubblegum Pink",desc:"Sweet and soft — the one everyone wants to borrow.",price:49,hex:"#f7a8c4",img:"data:image/png;base64,",isNew:false},
  {id:2,name:"Citrus Orange",desc:"Match your Citrus Burst mist. Zesty, warm and bold.",price:49,hex:"#f5830a",img:"data:image/png;base64,",isNew:true},
  {id:3,name:"Sunshine Yellow",desc:"Bright and sunny — impossible to lose in any bag.",price:49,hex:"#f5d327",img:"data:image/png;base64,",isNew:false},
  {id:4,name:"Forest Green",desc:"Fresh and earthy — twins perfectly with Spearmint Frost.",price:49,hex:"#3dac4e",img:"data:image/png;base64,",isNew:false},
  {id:5,name:"Sky Blue",desc:"Cool and calm. Natural pair for Ocean Breeze.",price:49,hex:"#74c5f0",img:"data:image/png;base64,",isNew:false},
  {id:6,name:"Lavender",desc:"Dreamy and soft — made for your Lavender Calm mist.",price:49,hex:"#c084e0",img:"data:image/png;base64,",isNew:false},
  {id:7,name:"Cherry Red",desc:"Unapologetically bold. For the ones who get noticed.",price:49,hex:"#e83030",img:"data:image/png;base64,",isNew:false},
  {id:8,name:"Jet Black",desc:"Sleek, minimal and powerful. Goes with everything.",price:55,hex:"#2a2a2a",img:"data:image/png;base64,",isNew:false},
  {id:9,name:"Cloud White",desc:"Crisp and timeless. The one that matches literally everything.",price:49,hex:"#e8e8e8",img:"data:image/png;base64,",isNew:false},
];
const sel = new Set();

function render(){
  // Swatches
  document.getElementById('swatches').innerHTML = ITEMS.map(it =>
    `<div class="swatch ${sel.has(it.id)?'active':''}" style="background:${it.hex}" title="${it.name}" onclick="tog(${it.id})"></div>`
  ).join('');

  // Cards
  document.getElementById('grid').innerHTML = ITEMS.map(it => `
    <div class="card ${sel.has(it.id)?'sel':''}" id="c${it.id}" onclick="tog(${it.id})">
      ${it.isNew?'<div class="nbadge">New</div>':''}
      <div class="chk">
        <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none"><polyline points="1.5,6 4.5,9.5 10.5,2.5" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="vis"><img src="${it.img}" alt="${it.name}"></div>
      <div class="bd">
        <span class="color-dot" style="background:${it.hex}"></span>
        <p class="nm">${it.name}</p>
        <p class="ds">${it.desc}</p>
        <div class="ft">
          <span class="pr">R${it.price}</span>
          <button class="ab" onclick="event.stopPropagation();tog(${it.id})">${sel.has(it.id)?'Remove':'Add'}</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `).join('');

  // Bar
  const s = ITEMS.filter(i => sel.has(i.id));
  const bv = document.getElementById('bval'), bt = document.getElementById('btot');
  if(!s.length){
    bv.innerHTML='<span class="empty">Tap any cover to add it</span>';
    bt.style.display='none';
  } else {
    bv.textContent = s.map(i=>i.name).join(' · ');
    bt.textContent = 'R'+s.reduce((a,i)=>a+i.price,0);
    bt.style.display='block';
  }
}

function tog(id){ sel.has(id)?sel.delete(id):sel.add(id); render(); }
function cart(){
  const s=ITEMS.filter(i=>sel.has(i.id));
  if(!s.length){alert('Pick at least one cover!');return;}
  alert('Added to cart!\n\n'+s.map(i=>i.name+' — R'+i.price).join('\n')+'\n\nTotal: R'+s.reduce((a,i)=>a+i.price,0));
}
render();
</script>
</body>
</html>
